_comment: Workshop Video 03 — The Toolkit (split-off from Video 02 scenes 4-6). Custom slash commands + MCPs + Context7. Single-stem rendering. Visual concerns live in src/WorkshopVideo03TheToolkit.tsx. House voice preset.

scenes.text: The magic — you write your own. Slash-session-start kicks off your work. Slash-pre-compact captures everything before the context window drops. Slash-session-close wraps it all up. Three commands, one loop — and Claude knows exactly where you are at every stage.

MCPs are how Claude reaches outside the chat. Six worth knowing: Sequential Thinking for reasoning. Filesystem for files. Fetch for the web. Context7 for live docs. AppleScript for your Mac. Playwright for the browser. Run slash-mcp-status to see them wired up.
Context7 is live API documentation — always current. When you're planning a build, ask Claude to use the Context7 MCP to review the docs first. Plan from real source, not a guess.
